status_reason: Live Nebraska DHHS Medicaid eligibility and overview leaves now provide the statewide application, eligibility, and coverage path on the real official domain.
Live Nebraska DHHS waiver-eligibility evidence now replaces the dead legacy waiver root.
Live Nebraska DHHS Developmental Disabilities and waiver-eligibility leaves now prove the statewide DD authority and appeals path on the reviewed official domain.
The official Nebraska Early Development Network site now provides a live statewide Part C route with referral, eligibility, service-coordination, and planning-region navigation.
Live Nebraska Department of Education special-education, complaint, mediation, and due-process leaves now replace the stale generic home-page packet sample.
Reviewed NDE leaves prove statewide special-education dispute paths only; no reviewed district-owned or county-grade education-routing leaf is preserved on disk.
Live Nebraska VR now provides the statewide vocational-rehabilitation route on the correct official subdomain.
Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Nebraska evidence explicitly proves the statewide P&A role.

Reviewed first-party PTI Nebraska evidence explicitly states that it has served as Nebraska’s Parent Training and Information Center since 2001 and that Nebraska has one federally funded Parent Center.
Reviewed first-party Legal Aid of Nebraska evidence now provides a real statewide civil legal-aid route.
Statewide evidence is present at the required authority level.
Statewide evidence is present at the required authority level.

The reviewed Nebraska Public Assistance Offices chain now exposes a public ArcGIS feature layer with 42 office records and county/phone/address fields, but those rows name only 37 office counties and do not preserve explicit county-to-office coverage for the remaining counties.
